title: Proxmox QEMU/KVM Live Migration Task Failure Detection
app: Proxmox TA (Splunkbase app 7896), Universal Forwarder on PVE nodes
spl:
index=virtualization sourcetype="proxmox:task" task_type="qmigrate" earliest=-24h
| where status="ERROR" OR status="error" OR like(lower(_raw), "%error%")
| stats count by vmid, source_node, target_node, upid
| sort -count
description: Failed `qmigrate` tasks leave operators unsure whether a guest actually moved before maintenance. Tracking migration task outcomes catches stuck transfers, storage mismatches, and CPU flag incompatibilities while the maintenance window is still open.
value: Reduces unplanned downtime during Proxmox rolling maintenance by proving each live migration completed successfully.
implementation: Ingest Proxmox cluster task history (TA **Node Task** or `/var/log/pve/tasks/`). Map `qmigrate` UPIDs to `vmid` and source/target nodes. Treat non-success end states as incidents. Correlate with Corosync latency and storage latency on the path.
visualization: Table (failed migrations), Timeline (migration task stream), Single value (error count).
